alpha: This field may only contain alphabetic characters
alpha_num: This field may only contain alpha-numeric characters
alpha_dash: This field may contain alpha-numeric characters as well as dashes and underscores
alpha_spaces: This field may only contain alphabetic characters as well as spaces
numeric: This field may only contain numeric characters
double: This field must be a valid decimal
decimal: This field must be a valid decimal
boolean: This field must be true or false
at_least_one_required_if_empty: At least one field is required
email: This field value must be a valid email address
ip: Please enter a valid IP address
phone_number: Please provide a valid phone number
same_as: This field value must be the same as {field}
postal_code: Please enter a valid postal code
credit_card: Please enter a valid credit card number
valid_name: This field value must be a valid name
json: This field must be a valid JSON string
hex: This field must be a valid hexadecimal value
min_length: This field value must be at least {min} characters
max_length: This field value may not be greater than {max} characters
between: This field value must be between {min} and {max}
digits: This field value must be numeric and exactly contain {digits} digits
max_emoji: This field value may not be greater than {length} characters
min_value: This field value must be {min} or more
max_value: This field value must be {max} or less
equal: The value must be equal to {value}
not_equal: The value must not be equal to {value}
different: The value must be different from {field}
confirmed: This field confirmation does not match
this_field_value_does_not_match_with: This field value does not match with {{name}}
ext: This field is not a valid file
image: This field must be an image
mimes: This field must have a valid file type
size: This field size must be less than {0}KB
file_size: The file size must not exceed {size} MB
filetype: The file must be of type {types}
dimensions: This field value must be {0} pixels by {1} pixels
supported_document_formats: Supported document formats include: txt, pdf, ppt, doc, xls, docx, pptx, xlsx
max_time_limit: The time can't be greater than {max} when the unit is {unit}
broadcast_cannot_take_longer_than_7_days: Broadcast cannot take longer than {{duration}} days to send
field_contains_emoji: This field should not include any emojis
field_contains_urls: This field should not include any URLs
special_characters_are_not_allowed_here_: Special characters are not allowed here e.g. ~!@#$%^&*
only_alphanumeric_characters_underscore_: This field can only contain alphanumeric characters, dashes, underscores and space
only_lowercase_alphanumeric_characters_a: Only lowercase alphanumeric characters and underscores are allowed
this_field_can_only_contain_numbers: This field can only contain numbers
this_field_only_accepts_positive_numbers: This field only accepts positive numbers
this_field_must_contain_less_than_length: This field must contain less than {{length}} {{context}}
value_greater_may_cause_display_issues_o: Field value greater than {{length}} characters may cause display issues on certain channels
oneOf: This field is not a valid value
excluded: This field is not a valid value
tags_items_must_be_less_than_characters: Items must be less than {{maxLength}} characters
tags_there_can_only_be_a_maximum_of_item: There can only be a maximum of {{maxTags}} item
youve_reached_the_maximum_number_of_tags: You've reached the maximum number of tags for this contact. Remove some tags to add a different tag
the_first_letter_of_a_variable_should_be: The first letter of a variable should be either a letter or an underscore
this_field_should_be_a_letter_number_und: This field only allow letters, numbers and underscores
variable_names_can_only_contain_letters_: Variable names can only contain letters, digits and underscore '_'
variable_placeholder_must_be_in_the_foll: Variable placeholder must be in the following format {{variable_name}}
you_can_add_only_one_variable_to_the_hea: You can add only one variable to the Header Text of Product Marketing Template Messages
url_must_be_less_than_character_limit_ch: URL must be less than {{characterLimit}} characters
parameters_must_be_at_the_end_of_url: Parameters must be at the end of URL
please_select_a_channel: Please select a channel to continue
channel_not_found_last_interacted: Cannot select channel(s) that has been deleted. Remove them to continue
channel_not_found_specific: Cannot select channel that has been deleted. Choose another channel to continue
whatsapp_enabled_number_is_incorrect_eg_: WhatsApp Enabled Number is incorrect (e.g. whatsapp:+1234567890)
whatsapp_bsp_min_max_validation: Minimum amount is {{min}} and maximum amount is {{max}}
submenu_can_not_be_empty_please_provide_: Submenu can not be empty. Please provide Button in Submenu
the_submenu_name_cannot_exceed_character: The Submenu Name cannot exceed {characterLimit} characters
a_minimum_of_one_column_mapping_set_is_r: A minimum of one column mapping set is required
inactivity_period_cannot_be_less_than_1: Inactivity Period cannot be less than 1
inactivity_period_cannot_be_greater_than: Inactivity Period cannot be greater than 60
password_contains_at_least_10_character: Password must be contains at least 10 characters
terms_accepted: You must accept the terms and conditions
agreement_required: You must agree to the terms and conditions
username_min_length: Username must be at least {min} characters long
username_max_length: Username must be no more than {max} characters long
username_alpha_num: Username may only contain letters and numbers
password_min_length: Password must be at least {min} characters long
password_max_length: Password must be no more than {max} characters long
email_email: Please enter a valid email address
email_unique: This email address is already registered
phone_numeric: Phone number may only contain numeric values
phone_min_length: Phone number must be at least {min} digits long
phone_max_length: Phone number must be no more than {max} digits long
age_min: You must be at least {min} years old
age_max: You must be no older than {max} years old
address_min_length: Address must be at least {min} characters long
address_max_length: Address must be no more than {max} characters long
name_max_length: Name must be no more than {max} characters long
description_max_length: Description must be no more than {max} characters long
price_numeric: Price must be a valid number
quantity_integer: Quantity must be a whole number
date_of_birth_before_date: Date of birth must be before {before}
start_date_date: Please enter a valid start date
end_date_date: Please enter a valid end date
end_date_after_date: End date must be after the start date
color_hex: Please enter a valid hexadecimal color value
file_upload_file_size: File size must not exceed {size} MB
